title: Fix 'Securing Connection' hang — correct InternetIdentityProvider URL and AuthGuard initialization guard

requirements.summary: Configure InternetIdentityProvider with correct environment-specific identity provider URL to prevent Internet Identity iframe hang
acceptanceCriteria: The `InternetIdentityProvider` receives the correct `identityProvider` URL for the active environment (local vs. production).
No hardcoded unreachable URL is present in the provider configuration.
The Internet Identity iframe loads without hanging on 'Securing Connection' in both local and production environments.
The environment selection logic uses a reliable build-time or runtime flag (e.g., `import.meta.env.DEV` or `DFX_NETWORK`).

file_operations.description: Update the InternetIdentityProvider configuration to use the correct identityProvider URL based on environment. For local development (when `import.meta.env.DEV` is true), use `http://rdmx6-jaaaa-aaaaa-aaadq-cai.localhost:4943`. For production, use `https://identity.ic0.app`. Remove any hardcoded unreachable or malformed URLs that cause the Internet Identity iframe to hang on 'Securing Connection'. Add environment detection logic that reliably selects the correct URL at build time or runtime.

requirements.summary: Prevent AuthGuard from making routing decisions while Internet Identity is still initializing
acceptanceCriteria: `AuthGuard` renders the full-page military-themed loading spinner (matte black background, gold/green accents) when `isInitializing === true`.
No redirect to `/login` occurs while `isInitializing` is `true`.
After `isInitializing` settles to `false`, unauthenticated users are redirected to `/login` and authenticated users see their protected content.
The 'Securing Connection' screen does not appear indefinitely after this fix.

file_operations.description: Audit the RootLayout and AuthGuard logic to ensure no routing decision (redirect to `/login` or rendering protected content) occurs while `isInitializing` is `true`. While `isInitializing === true`, render only the full-page military-themed loading spinner with matte black background and gold/green accents. Only after `isInitializing` definitively settles to `false` should the guard redirect unauthenticated users to `/login` or render protected routes for authenticated users.

Ensure the ProtectedRoute component does not make any routing decisions or show authentication-dependent UI while `isInitializing` is `true`. Render the full-page military-themed loading spinner during initialization. Only after initialization is complete should the component check authentication state and either redirect to login or render the protected outlet.

requirements.summary: Enforce strict three-condition check in useActorReady hook to prevent premature actor readiness signal
acceptanceCriteria: `isActorReady` returns `false` when the actor instance is `null` or `undefined`.
`isActorReady` returns `true` only after all three conditions are simultaneously satisfied.
No premature `true` value causes dependent queries to fire before the identity is resolved.

file_operations.description: Rewrite the useActorReady hook to enforce that `isActorReady` returns `true` only when all three conditions are met in strict order: (a) `isInitializing` from `useInternetIdentity` is `false`, (b) the principal is non-anonymous (not equal to `Principal.anonymous()`), and (c) the actor instance returned by `useActor` is non-null. If the hook currently sets `isActorReady` to `true` before any of these conditions are satisfied, update the logic to check all three conditions strictly and simultaneously before returning `true`.
